AgentsKit is a plug-and-play TypeScript toolkit for building production agents: adapters, runtime, tools, skills, memory, RAG, UI, observability, sandboxing, evals, and templates.

## Knowledge

- [adapters](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/adapters.mdx): Every LLM provider, one contract. Stream, tool calls, retry, abort all normalized. Plus higher-order adapters that compose candidates (router, ensemble, fallback) and a `createAdapter` factory for custom providers.
- [peers:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/angular.mdx): Angular binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Exposes chat state as a `WritableSignal<ChatState>` for template binding and as an `Observable<ChatState>` for RxJS pipelines, with automatic teardown via `ngOnDestroy`.
- [or:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/cli.mdx)
- [core](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/core.mdx): Stable TypeScript contracts (Adapter, Tool, Memory, Retriever, Skill, Runtime) + `createChatController` + primitives. Target: &lt;10 KB gzipped, zero runtime deps.
- [eval-braintrust](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/eval-braintrust.mdx)
- [eval](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/eval.mdx)
- [index](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/index.mdx): If you're an AI agent reading this: every page in this section is a condensed reference for one AgentsKit package. Each page follows the same structure so you can skim quickly and quote accurately:
- [peers:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/ink.mdx): Ink binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Renders a full chat interface in the terminal using React + Ink, with keyboard navigation, ANSI theming, and human-in-the-loop tool confirmation — no browser required.
- [integrations](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/integrations.mdx)
- [mcp](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/mcp.mdx): Serve AgentsKit tools to any MCP host. A thin bridge over `@agentskit/tools/mcp` (`createMcpServer` + `createStdioTransport`).
- [memory](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/memory.mdx)
- [observability-langfuse](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/observability-langfuse.mdx)
- [observability](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/observability.mdx)
- [rag](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/rag.mdx)
- [peers:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/react-native.mdx): React Native binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Shares the same hook API as `@agentskit/react` but ships without any DOM dependency, making it safe for Metro bundler and the Hermes JS engine used in React Native and Expo.
- [react](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/react.mdx): `useChat` hook returning `ChatReturn` (state + actions) + headless components with `data-ak-*` attributes for theming.
- [runtime](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/runtime.mdx): Run an agent without a UI. Supports reflection, planning, multi-agent orchestration, durable step logs, cron + webhooks, speculative execution.
- [sandbox](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/sandbox.mdx)
- [skills](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/skills.mdx)
- [peer:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/solid.mdx): SolidJS binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Same shape as React/Vue/Svelte hooks — store-backed, cleanup wired via `onCleanup`.
- [statechart](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/statechart.mdx): Represent deterministic interaction state independently from UI frameworks, providers, agent execution, and persistence.
- [peer:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/svelte.mdx): Svelte binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Returns a `Readable<ChatState>` plus action methods (send / stop / clear) and `destroy()` for cleanup.
- [templates](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/templates.mdx): Generate AgentsKit extensions (tools, skills, adapters) as standalone packages with consistent blueprints (tsup, vitest, TypeScript) and runtime validation. Depends only on `@agentskit/core`.
- [tools](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/tools.mdx)
- [validation](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/validation.mdx)
- [peer:](apps/docs-next/content/docs/for-agents/vue.mdx): Vue 3 binding for the `ChatReturn` contract from `@agentskit/core`. Returns a reactive object via `reactive()` that tracks messages, input, and streaming state, and tears down automatically when the component scope is disposed.
